arts.ttl: Everton and AS Roma could share key role as Friedkins eye up major hire
arts.sum: Everton could share a director of football with AS Roma in the near future, as the Friedkin Group eye up former Atletico Madrid chief Andrea Berta. That’s according to La Repubblica, who report that the American group are considering a change at Roma and that could also end up affecting Everton.
